Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}If that figure is summoning these Shadows... I guess it's an enemy...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But then... Why does it seem so similar to...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Um, anyway, it still seems like it won't attack, so focus on the Shadow![n]{f 1 1}
